_comment: EDIT THIS FILE to change ebook cards. 'status' can be: available | coming-soon. 'link' points to a download/sales page (replace # later). 'category' is shown as a small tag.

ebooks.title: 1000 High-Frequency Vocabulary
ebooks.description: The words that actually repeat across admission and bank exams, with meaning, usage and Bangla glosses.

ebooks.title: Quant Formula Bible
ebooks.description: Every formula you need for aptitude tests in one organised, revision-friendly reference.

ebooks.title: The English Grammar System
ebooks.description: Grammar explained as a connected system — rules, logic and the traps examiners love.

ebooks.title: The Corporate Career Playbook
ebooks.description: CV, interview and early-career guidance for ambitious professionals entering banking and corporate roles.
